title: Savory Crispy Vietnamese Chicken Stir-fry
description: A post-workout-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring savory chicken stir-fry with a kick of green salsa for added protein and crunch.
instructions: Marinate chicken in lime juice, soy sauce, sugar, and minced garlic for at least 15 minutes.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add marinated chicken pieces and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 4-5 minutes per side.
Add green chilies and minced garlic to the pan; stir-fry for another minute.
Mix tomato sauce with lime juice and pour it into the wok, stirring well so all ingredients are coated evenly.
Add sliced bell peppers and continue to stir-fry until vegetables are tender but still crisp. Season with salt if needed.
Sprinkle sesame seeds on top of the chicken for additional texture.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
